title: Authomations aren't working
excerpt: My automations are working. Is anyone else experiencing this?

posts.author: asktiedavis (Tieshena Davis)
posts.cookedHtml: My automations are working. Is anyone else experiencing this?

posts.author: BagiMuvi.99 (Andrew Carsten)
posts.cookedHtml: Can anyone answer this topic? I’m looking for someone to answer because I have the same topic. If anyone has solution, please tag me. Thanks a lot.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @asktiedavis and @BagiMuvi.99 sorry that you were having issues with automations. Everything should be working great now! It seems some accounts may have experienced some disruptions to their automations for a very short time but it has ben quickly resolved. If you are still having issues with it let me know!
